title: THE RETURNED BOX
subtitle: The Bungalow · 11:40 AM · RETURN TO SENDER, in her own handwriting
epigraph_upright: The High Priestess knows what's in the box without opening it. That was never the question. The question is what it means that the box came back.
epigraph_reversed: A box you packed in one life, returned to you in another, is a letter from yourself with no note inside. You can leave it on the porch. Boxes keep. That's their whole job.
scene_description: The box went to the Montreal sublet in March. The sublet ended; the forwarding lapsed; the postal system, patient as water, brought it home. It's on the porch with her own March handwriting on it — a person she remembers being, addressing a future that didn't happen. Inside is nothing mysterious: the second camera, the grey sweater, the tarot deck that was never the good deck. The mystery is only and entirely whether to unpack it or re-address it, and to where.
direction_hint: Bring the box in. What it becomes — shelf, closet, or a new address — is the reading. Connect three, keep the reel down, and don't let the noon phone call happen AT the box.
opening_log_lines: The porch board creaks under the box's weight. Eleven pounds of March.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] for the rules. The tape is her tape. The tape gun is still in the closet.
The deck inside is not the good deck. She can feel that through the cardboard. Some knowledge is just knowledge.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the script page has been on the side table for nine days.
the cult audience has, just now, started typing.

doubt_thresholds.label: elicia at the bookshelf. the shard between thumb and forefinger.
the reflection is twelve elicias. none whole.
the storage closet door is, this evening, slightly ajar.

notes: Fourth setup (Wave-3D, 2026-07-19) · mid-tier at a distinct hour. Wave-1 arcana: win/loss keys inherited VERBATIM from the medium sibling (bespoke engine schema); numbers between the easy and hard bookends.
ambient_pool: the cicadas at dusk · the shard between thumb and forefinger · twelve elicias.
the basil has, today, two yellow leaves.
the storage closet door is slightly ajar. you have not, today, opened it.
anya on screen, mid-sentence, paused on the breath.

scenario_visitors.name: the returned box, eleven pounds, her own handwriting
scenario_visitors.lore_text: March-Elicia wrote the address in the good pen, carefully, the way you address a box when the move is still a decision you're proud of. The postal service added its yellow sticker without comment. Between the two inscriptions is the whole spring.
scenario_visitors.tutorial_note: The box connects through sitting with it — bring it inside, set it on the table, and read the OUTSIDE completely before deciding about the inside.

steps.greet: It's heavier than memory said. Boxes always are.
steps.listen: The handwriting is hers but tilted with optimism — March hand. The yellow sticker is bureaucracy's tarot: UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED. As addressed. The qualifier is doing the work.
steps.deliver: She opens it or she doesn't — but she decides ON PURPOSE, at the table, in the daylight, which is the entire difference between a reading and a haunting.
steps.sit_with: The sweater, if the box opens, still smells like the bungalow — it never got to smell like anywhere else. Nothing in the box made the journey. The journey was the contents.
